name: Deviled Ham Muffins
recipeIngredient: 24 oz cheddar cheese, medium, sliced into 12 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the muffins and toast them. Spread butter on the cut sides.
2. Core but do not peel the apple rings.
3. Slice the cheddar cheese into 12 pieces that are approximately 2 ounces each.
4. Combine the deviled ham and oregano, spreading it evenly on the cut sides of the muffins.
5. Place an apple ring on top of each muffin.
6. Add two cheddar cheese triangles to each muffin.
7. Broil until the cheese melts. Serve hot.
